title: sloanea cuautitlanensis
intro: Sloanea cuautitlanensis, also known as the Cuautitlán sloanea, is a species of plant in the family Ebenaceae. It is a tropical tree native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to contribute to its various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against certain diseases. The herbal preparations of Sloanea cuautitlanensis typically involve the leaves or bark being dried and used in teas or infusions, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some regions.
